problem.title: Find Minimum in Rotated Sorted Array
problem.description: Suppose an array of length n sorted in ascending order is rotated between 1 and n times.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Binary Search
solutions.description: Use binary search by comparing the midpoint to the rightmost element: if nums[mid] > nums[right], the minimum lies in the right half (the rotation point is there); otherwise it lies in the left half including mid. This narrows the search range by half each step, achieving O(log n) without ever scanning the whole array.
